title: FINAL Frontrunner Friday Oscar Predictions of the 2025/2026 Season
text: This comprehensive predictions article covers all 24 categories for the 98th Academy Awards, taking place March 15 at the Dolby Theater in Hollywood. The article presents final winner predictions alongside supporting wins from major award bodies. Best Picture: One Battle After Another (Warner Bros), predicted to win BAFTA, CCA, GG, SAG, and PGA awards. Best Director: Paul Thomas Anderson for One Battle After Another, with wins predicted from BAFTA, CCA, DGA, and Golden Globes. Best Actor: Michael B. Jordan in Sinners, with SAG Award support predicted. Best Actress: Jessie Buckley in Hamnet, predicted winner of BAFTA, CCA, Golden Globe, and SAG awards. Best Animated Feature: KPop Demon Hunters (Netflix) leads predictions with Annie, CCA, and Golden Globe wins anticipated. Best Documentary Feature: The Perfect Neighbor (Netflix) is the predicted winner. The article includes detailed rankings across all major categories, noting supporting wins from organizations including BAFTA, Golden Globes, SAG Awards, and guild awards (DGA, WGA, ASC, etc.).
